title: Create: Just Extended
description: A Create 6 based modpack with a focus on automation and quality of life features
body:
# Create: Just Extended
A Create 6 + Aeronautics based modpack with a focus on automation, quality of life, and building. 
Designed for wholly automating things ranging from building blocks to components without compromising on sensible recipes.

Content and automation prioritizes Create.

New world generation strives for better looking terrain over more loot.

Never struggle to gather building materials.
